violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left at counter next to prep table, no sani bucket present. *Corrected on-site-filled sani bucket and obtained clean cloth.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. -Single use styrofoam bowl used as scoop, left in sugar. -Plastic food container used as scoop, left in powdered sugar.--Material of food contact equipment/utensil is not approved for use by food service code. -White grocery sack used to store bread in refrigerator.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use cutlery stored on floor below front service counter. -Boxes of stirring straws stored on floor below front counter. -Box of miscellaneous single use items stored on floor near back room shelving. -Case of hoagie clamshells stored on floor near back door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Portions of upper wall and ceiling are unfinished in back room. -Shelves used in the utility room are unsealed particle boards.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
